text.title: rust-testing-property Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for rust-testing-property as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Discarding failing proptest seeds from CI output instead of committing them as regression tests.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A seed that reproduced a real bug is a free regression test. Discarding it means the same edge case can reappear in a later refactor undetected.

failure-mode.description: Using proptest for tests that require a specific fixed input to demonstrate behavior.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: proptest randomizes inputs; you cannot rely on a specific value being generated. Use a regular #[test] with a fixed example for behavior documentation, and add proptest for invariant coverage on top.
